posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

posts.title: Hello Hexo with Icarus Theme
posts.text: Welcome to Your Hexo Blog!Congratulations on setting up your Hexo blog with the Icarus theme! This is your first post. What You Can Do Now Write blog posts using Markdown Organize posts with categories and tags Customize your blog with the Icarus theme Deploy to GitHub Pages, Netlify, or other platforms Next Steps Edit the site configuration in _config.yml Customize the theme in _config.icarus.yml Start writing your first posts Deploy your blog online Happy blogging! 🚀

pages.title: About Me
pages.text: Welcome to My BlogThis is the about page of my personal blog. You can tell visitors about yourself here. About MeHi! I’m a passionate developer and blogger. I share my thoughts, experiences, and knowledge about: Web Development Programming Technology And much more! Contact MeFeel free to reach out through social media or email. I’d love to hear from you!
